SEARCH
Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.model

Record Class BotSnapshot

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.monkey.mcbot.api.model.BotSnapshot
Record Components:
ownerUUID - owner UUID associated with this bot slot
botUUID - runtime bot entity UUID, may be null when unavailable
botType - bot type label
botRank - current rank label
minBotRank - minimum allowed rank label
maxBotRank - maximum allowed rank label
follow - current follow state
combat - current combat state
totemCount - current totem count
minTotemCount - minimum allowed totems
maxTotemCount - maximum allowed totems
targetUUID - primary target UUID, when available
targetUUIDs - full target set (for multi-target modes)
source - origin of bot creation (core/api)
public record BotSnapshot(UUID ownerUUID, UUID botUUID, String botType, String botRank, String minBotRank, String maxBotRank, boolean follow, boolean combat, int totemCount, int minTotemCount, int maxTotemCount, UUID targetUUID, Set<UUID> targetUUIDs, BotSource source, boolean autoTarget, double autoTargetRange, boolean respectWorldGuardPvp, boolean stayAfterOwnerDeath, boolean idleWander, double idleWanderRadius, double idleReturnDistance, long idleReturnDelayMs, boolean crystalPvp, boolean enderPearls, boolean killMessageEnabled) extends Record
Immutable runtime snapshot of a managed bot.

    Creates an instance of a BotSnapshot record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • BotSnapshot

      public BotSnapshot(UUID ownerUUID, UUID botUUID, String botType, String botRank, String minBotRank, String maxBotRank, boolean follow, boolean combat, int totemCount, int minTotemCount, int maxTotemCount, UUID targetUUID, Set<UUID> targetUUIDs, BotSource source, boolean autoTarget, double autoTargetRange, boolean respectWorldGuardPvp, boolean stayAfterOwnerDeath, boolean idleWander, double idleWanderRadius, double idleReturnDistance, long idleReturnDelayMs, boolean crystalPvp, boolean enderPearls, boolean killMessageEnabled)
      Creates an instance of a BotSnapshot record class.
      Parameters:
      ownerUUID - the value for the ownerUUID record component
      botUUID - the value for the botUUID record component
      botType - the value for the botType record component
      botRank - the value for the botRank record component
      minBotRank - the value for the minBotRank record component
      maxBotRank - the value for the maxBotRank record component
      follow - the value for the follow record component
      combat - the value for the combat record component
      totemCount - the value for the totemCount record component
      minTotemCount - the value for the minTotemCount record component
      maxTotemCount - the value for the maxTotemCount record component
      targetUUID - the value for the targetUUID record component
      targetUUIDs - the value for the targetUUIDs record component
      source - the value for the source record component
      autoTarget - the value for the autoTarget record component
      autoTargetRange - the value for the autoTargetRange record component
      respectWorldGuardPvp - the value for the respectWorldGuardPvp record component
      stayAfterOwnerDeath - the value for the stayAfterOwnerDeath record component
      idleWander - the value for the idleWander record component
      idleWanderRadius - the value for the idleWanderRadius record component
      idleReturnDistance - the value for the idleReturnDistance record component
      idleReturnDelayMs - the value for the idleReturnDelayMs record component
      crystalPvp - the value for the crystalPvp record component
      enderPearls - the value for the enderPearls record component
      killMessageEnabled - the value for the killMessageEnabled record component

  • Method Details

    • hasTarget

      public boolean hasTarget()
      Indicates whether at least one target is currently assigned.
      Returns:
      true when primary target exists or target set is not empty

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
